attempts.strategy: STEP1 keystone: build the localized strong-monoidal sheafification + its right-adjoint lax structure

attempts.strategy: STEP0 GATE: unfold rightAdjointLaxMonoidal tensorator, peel adjunction unit, congr 1
attempts.code_tried: unfold tensorator to homEquiv (delta >> (eps tensor eps)); rw Adjunction.homEquiv_apply; congr 1 (delta = mu.inv by oplaxMonoidal_delta_eq rfl; eps = counit; so delta >> (eps tensor eps) = (tensorObjLocalizedIso F G).hom by rfl)
attempts.insight: GATE OUTCOME: tensorator is NOT defeq sectionsMul; mu_Gamma|_top = sectionsMul(F,G) >> Gamma((tensorObjLocalizedIso F G).hom). The bridge is light/fully-proved because it lives in the presheaf category (single comp-instance), NOT the modulesLocalizedMonoidal<->X.Modules dual-instance regime that bombed the associator bridge. Axiom-clean, verified firsthand.

next_steps: Add the gate as an explicit blueprint sub-claim of lem:sectionsFunctor_laxMonoidal; correct the on-the-nose mu=sectionsMul prose.

attempts.strategy: Route B via full faithfulness of tilde (Stacks 01I9): cancel trailing per-chart dictionary, reduce categorical square to one preimage identity
attempts.code_tried: apply Iso.ext; simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom, Category.assoc, tilde.functor_obj]; rw [<- Iso.inv_comp_eq]; refine Eq.trans (tilde.fullyFaithfulFunctor.map_preimage _).symm (congrArg _ ?_); have h3 ... := by rw [<- goal2]; simp; rw [h3, hs]; simp only [Iso.trans_assoc]; rfl
